summary: Iteration 7: Full testing of new features - Reminders settings, Database settings, Calendar month/year search. All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
seed_data_creation: Settings saved via PUT /api/settings with test@cinema.com admin email
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features verified: (1) GET/PUT /api/settings with API key masking works; (2) GET /api/settings/database returns collections/objects/sizes/current_url; (3) POST /api/settings/database/test validates connection; (4) POST /api/settings/database/reset restores original URL; (5) POST /api/reminders/send returns events_found/target_date/sent; (6) Settings page at /ajustes shows Recordatorios section (toggle=ACTIVO badge, slider, Email/WhatsApp/Ambos channel, admin email, Resend API key, save + test buttons); (7) Base de Datos section visible with stats; (8) Calendar search bar: lupa button (data-testid=calendar-search-toggle) opens bar with month/year selects and Hoy button; (9) All existing endpoints still work.
rca_of_issues: No bugs found. Note: calendar-search-toggle button initially seemed unclickable but worked correctly via data-testid selector. The issue was a generic button:has(svg) selector hitting the mobile menu toggle first.
